title: Simonuwu Fabric Project
description: This modpack has the function of replacing OptiFine by replicating its functions and also adding new ones.
body:
![Simonuwu Fabric Project](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/860e30db41a741d48737ae837227501e7acaafd0_0.webp)




This modpack has the function of replacing optifine by replicating its functions and also adding new ones, at the moment it is at 1.21.11 later if it receives a lot of support I will do it for almost all previous versions I am currently accommodating a compatilibity for all versions Minecraft

## MODS:

**3D Skin Layers** https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers                                              
**AppleSkin** https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin                                                       
**Better Third Person** https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person                                
**Continuity** https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity                                                     
**Entity Culling** https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling                                               
**Entity Model Features** https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features                                     
**Entity Texture Features** https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures                             
**Fabric API** https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api  , https://fabricmc.net                    
**Fabric Language Kotlin** https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin                          
**In-Game Account Switcher** https://modrinth.com/mod/in-game-account-switcher   
**Jade🔍** https://modrinth.com/mod/jade                                                               
**Iris Shaders** https://modrinth.com/mod/iris , https://www.irisshaders.dev/                         
**LambDynamicLights** https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights       
**Lithium** https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium                                                       
**MiniHUD** https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud And its API MaLiLib https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib                                                            
**ModMenu** https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu ant its API Text Placeholder API https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api                                        
**Not Enough Animations** https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations                                 
**REI** https://modrinth.com/mod/rei(API Architectury https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api ,API Cloth Config https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)                                            
**ReplayMod** https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod , https://www.replaymod.com     
**Xaero's Minimap** https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap                                              
**Xaero's World Map** https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map                                                                                                       
**Zoomify** https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify and its API YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl                                     

Sodium and its 2 improvements:                                                                    
 
**Sodium** https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium                                       
**Sodium Extra** https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra                                 
**Reese's Sodium Options** https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options               

## Resource Packs:

**Fresh Animations** https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations               
**Translations for Sodium** https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium

Work in progress
